name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【Manhattan 24cm】
New in-store synchronized Manhattan Baguette Small 24cm! The latest bag style, a flap Manhattan bag, replaces the classic logo with a low-key, minimalist design style. It is a bit like a Hermès Kelly, full of retro vibes! Combining business and casual, it is versatile! Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, multi-functional, satisfying both business women and young girls! Carefully selected original factory leather, perfect stitching, exquisite hardware, exuding a high-end aura!
Model: 675626
Size: 24x17.5x6cm
